title: SOAV-068 Married Woman's Cheating Heart Natsuki Takeuchi
description: Mr. Takeuchi says that his husband's work from home caused a crack in the couple's relationship. It is said that the husband, who accumulates stress in the mood of self-restraint these days, changes the atmosphere day by day, and the other day he hits stress in the form of violence. Disappointed with the selfish husband's idea that he was the only one who had a hard time, he lost his affection and appeared before us today because he wanted to be healed by something.
maker: 人妻援護会/エマニエル
